DELETE /accounts/{account_id}/flagship/a.description: Deletes a flag permanently. Subsequent evaluations fall back to the caller-supplied default. Cannot be undone.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/flagship/apps.description: Lists an app's flags ordered by key. Pass `cursor` from `result_info` to page forward; a null cursor indicates the last page.

parameters.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response.
parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response.

default_variation.description: Variation the API serves when the flag is off, or when it's on but no rule matches the context. Must be a key in `variations`.

enabled.description: When false, the flag bypasses all rules and always serves `default_variation`.

key.description: Unique identifier for the flag within an app. Used in all evaluation and SDK calls.

rules.description: Targeting rules evaluated in ascending `priority`; the first matching rule wins. An empty array means the flag always serves `default_variation`.

conditions.description: Conditions the context must satisfy for this rule to match. An empty array matches all contexts.

priority.description: Evaluation order: the API evaluates rules with lower numbers first. Must be unique across the flag's rules.

attribute.description: Context attribute used for sticky bucketing. Defaults to `targetingKey`. If absent at evaluation time, bucketing is random per request.

percentage.description: Percentage of matching traffic (0–100) served this variation. For multi-way splits, use cumulative upper bounds across rules (e.g. 30, 70, 100).

serve_variation.description: Variation the API serves when this rule matches. Must be a key in `variations`.

type.description: Value type of the flag's variations. The API infers this from the variation values on write, so you can omit it in requests.

variations.description: Map of variation name to value. All values share the same type (boolean, string, number, or JSON object/array), and each serialized value stays within 10KB.

count.description: Number of items returned in this page.

cursor.description: Cursor to pass back to fetch the next page, or null when this is the last page.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/flagship/apps.description: Returns the full flag definition including rules, variations, and audit fields.

POST /accounts/{account_id}/flagship/app.description: Creates a flag. Returns 409 if the key already exists. `type` is inferred from variation values and may be omitted.

PUT /accounts/{account_id}/flagship/apps.description: Replaces the entire flag definition. Omitted fields are dropped, not preserved — read before writing. Each update appends a changelog entry.
